response.justification: Bogdan is a capable full-stack engineer with roughly 20 years of broad software experience and genuine entrepreneurial drive via GISCollective, but the role demands a Director-level individual contributor with deep, recognized AI expertise and a track record of advising strategic enterprise customers on cloud and AI adoption. His AI work is confined to the most recent ~13 months at re:cinq and is infrastructure/tooling rather than product strategy at scale. He has no cloud platform architecture background, no evidence of thought leadership in AI (publications, major AI products, or advisory engagements), and no advanced degree in an AI-related field — all of which are critical differentiators for this position.
strengths: 20 years of hands-on engineering experience spanning web, embedded, mobile, and infrastructure domains, exceeding the 15-year minimum
Entrepreneurial profile demonstrated through founding and sustaining GISCollective as an open-source geospatial platform used in production
Established knowledge-sharing practice via conference talks (FOSS4G), multi-day workshops, and community teaching — relevant to the 'inspire others' responsibility
concerns: AI expertise is nascent and narrow — limited to MCP tooling and agentic workflow infrastructure since April 2025, with no demonstrated AI products or platforms built at meaningful scale
No cloud platform strategy or enterprise advisory experience; AWS CDK usage at Optilyz reflects practitioner-level cloud work, not the strategic depth required to advise large customers
Current seniority is Staff/Senior IC with no evidence of Director-level scope, cross-org influence, or executive stakeholder engagement expected in this role
